cli template.name: CLI-001-BASELINE
cli template.script:
config system global
    set autorun-log-fsck enable
    set revision-backup-on-logout enable
    set gui-cdn-usage enable
    set admin-lockout-duration 600
    set cli-audit-log enable
    set admin-telnet disable
    set strong-crypto enable
    set dh-params 8192
    set ssl-static-key-ciphers disable
    set admintimeout 10
    set gui-fortigate-cloud-sandbox enable
    {%- if 'FortiGate-VM64' not in DVMDB.platform %}
    set admin-reset-button disable
    {%- endif %}
end
config system settings
    set internet-service-database-cache enable
end
config system auto-install
    set auto-install-config disable
    set auto-install-image disable
end
config system fortiguard
    set subscribe-update-notification enable
end
config log setting
    set fwpolicy-implicit-log enable
    set local-in-allow enable
    set local-in-deny-unicast enable
    set local-in-deny-broadcast enable
    set local-out enable
    set extended-log enable
    set extended-utm-log enable
    set resolve-ip enable
    set resolve-port enable
    set rest-api-set enable
    set rest-api-get enable
    set zone-name enable
end
config log memory filter
    set local-traffic enable
end
config log disk setting
    set status enable
    set maximum-log-age 0
end
config antivirus settings
    set machine-learning-detection enable
end

cli template.name: PRE-RUN_SDWAN
cli template.script:
config system admin
    edit "admin"
      set vdom "root"
      set accprofile "super_admin"
      set password ENC PB2z24R16jC1lJBExcPWAZ+0zd6yLBypIIRvtCDXHv4jSrREhFNCzaj4Fa9F+tV1OT46xChKTs1iPN8rT5Jec2TD62IHeZs933Om3zTDshga+g=
    next
end

cli template.name: CLI-002-INTERFACES
CLI-003-ROUTES
cli template.script:
config router static
    edit 1000
      set distance 254
      set blackhole enable
      set dstaddr "RFC1918-GRP"
      set vrf 0
    next
    {%- if branch_id|int < 256 %}
    edit 1001
      set distance 254
      set blackhole enable
      set dst 10.{{branch_id}}.0.0/16
      set vrf 0
    next
    {%- endif %}
end

cli template.name: CLI-004-IPMATH
cli template.script:
config router bgp
  set router-id {{'172.25.0.0'|ipmath(branch_id|int)}}
  {%- if branch_id|int < 256 %}
  config neighbor
    edit 172.25.1.254
      set route-map-out RM_BRANCHES-OUT
    next
  end
  config network
    edit 1000
      set prefix 10.{{branch_id}}.0.0/16
    next
  end
  {%- else %}
  config neighbor
    edit 172.25.1.254
      set route-map-out RM_SDWAN-1918-OUT
    next
  end
  {%- endif %}
end
config system sdwan
  config members
    edit 1
      set source {{'172.25.0.0'|ipmath(branch_id|int)}}
    next
    edit 2
      set source {{'172.25.0.0'|ipmath(branch_id|int)}}
    next
  end
end
config vpn ipsec phase1-interface
  edit "HUB1-O1"
    set exchange-ip-addr4 {{'172.25.0.0'|ipmath(branch_id|int)}}
  next
  {%- for interface in DEVDB_system_interface %}
  {%- if 'HUB1-02' in interface %}
  edit "HUB1-O2"
    set exchange-ip-addr4 {{'172.25.0.0'|ipmath(branch_id|int)}}
  next
  {%- endif %}
  {%- endfor %}
end

cli template.name: CLI-005-HA
CLI-006-HOSTNAME
CLI-007-ADMINS
cli template.script:
config system admin
    edit "admin"
      set trusthost1 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
      set trusthost2 172.30.1.254 255.255.255.255
      set trusthost3 172.30.3.254 255.255.255.255
      set trusthost4 169.254.0.1 255.255.255.255
    next
end
